self = <tests.test_client.TestClient object at 0x122259ba0> monkeypatch = <_pytest.monkeypatch.MonkeyPatch object at 0x1222d7680>
def test_get_order_book_default(self, monkeypatch): val_lim_mock = MagicMock() monkeypatch.setattr(self.client, '_validate_limit', val_lim_mock) symbol = 'TEST' > self.client.get_order_book(symbol)

self = <currencycom.client.Client object at 0x122470050>, symbol = 'TEST' limit = 100
def get_order_book(self, symbol, limit=100): """ Order book
:param symbol: :param limit: Default 100; max 1000. Valid limits:[5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 500, 1000, 5000] :return: dict object Response: { "lastUpdateId": 1027024, "asks": [ [ "4.00000200", // PRICE "12.00000000" // QTY ] ], "bids": [ [ "4.00000000", // PRICE "431.00000000" // QTY ] ] } """ self._validate_limit(limit) r = self.session.get(CurrencyComConstants.ORDER_BOOK_ENDPOINT, params={'symbol': symbol, 'limit': limit}) > return r.json() ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Future' object has no attribute 'json'

test_get_klines_default
testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_client.TestClient object at 0x122193790>
def test_get_klines_default(self): symbol = 'TEST' > self.client.get_klines(symbol, CandlesticksChartInervals.DAY)
tests/test_client.py:132: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <currencycom.client.Client object at 0x1224d7690>, symbol = 'TEST' interval = <CandlesticksChartInervals.DAY: '1d'>, start_time = None end_time = None, limit = 500
def get_klines(self, symbol, interval: CandlesticksChartInervals, start_time: datetime = None, end_time: datetime = None, limit=500): """ Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.
If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. :param symbol: :param interval: :param start_time: :param end_time: :param limit:Default 500; max 1000. :return: dict object
Response: [ [ 1499040000000, // Open time "0.01634790", // Open "0.80000000", // High "0.01575800", // Low "0.01577100", // Close "148976.11427815" // Volume. ] ] """ if limit > CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT: raise ValueError('Limit should not exceed {}'.format( CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT ))
params = {'symbol': symbol, 'interval': interval.value, 'limit': limit}
if start_time: params['startTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(start_time) if end_time: params['endTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(end_time) r = self.session.get(CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_DATA_ENDPOINT, params=params) > return r.json() ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Future' object has no attribute 'json'
currencycom/client.py:426: AttributeError

If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. :param symbol: :param interval: :param start_time: :param end_time: :param limit:Default 500; max 1000. :return: dict object
Response: [ [ 1499040000000, // Open time "0.01634790", // Open "0.80000000", // High "0.01575800", // Low "0.01577100", // Close "148976.11427815" // Volume. ] ] """ if limit > CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT: raise ValueError('Limit should not exceed {}'.format( CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT ))
params = {'symbol': symbol, 'interval': interval.value, 'limit': limit}
if start_time: params['startTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(start_time) if end_time: params['endTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(end_time) r = self.session.get(CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_DATA_ENDPOINT, params=params) > return r.json() ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Future' object has no attribute 'json'

def get_klines(self, symbol, interval: CandlesticksChartInervals, start_time: datetime = None, end_time: datetime = None, limit=500): """ Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.
If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. :param symbol: :param interval: :param start_time: :param end_time: :param limit:Default 500; max 1000. :return: dict object
Response: [ [ 1499040000000, // Open time "0.01634790", // Open "0.80000000", // High "0.01575800", // Low "0.01577100", // Close "148976.11427815" // Volume. ] ] """ if limit > CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT: raise ValueError('Limit should not exceed {}'.format( CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT ))
params = {'symbol': symbol, 'interval': interval.value, 'limit': limit}
if start_time: params['startTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(start_time) if end_time: params['endTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(end_time) r = self.session.get(CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_DATA_ENDPOINT, params=params) > return r.json() ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Future' object has no attribute 'json'

If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. :param symbol: :param interval: :param start_time: :param end_time: :param limit:Default 500; max 1000. :return: dict object
Response: [ [ 1499040000000, // Open time "0.01634790", // Open "0.80000000", // High "0.01575800", // Low "0.01577100", // Close "148976.11427815" // Volume. ] ] """ if limit > CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT: raise ValueError('Limit should not exceed {}'.format( CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT ))

def get_klines(self, symbol, interval: CandlesticksChartInervals, start_time: datetime = None, end_time: datetime = None, limit=500): """ Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.
If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. :param symbol: :param interval: :param start_time: :param end_time: :param limit:Default 500; max 1000. :return: dict object
Response: [ [ 1499040000000, // Open time "0.01634790", // Open "0.80000000", // High "0.01575800", // Low "0.01577100", // Close "148976.11427815" // Volume. ] ] """ if limit > CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT: raise ValueError('Limit should not exceed {}'.format( CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT ))

self = <tests.test_client.TestClient object at 0x122217750>
def test_get_klines_with_startTime_and_endTime(self): symbol = 'TEST' start_time = datetime(2020, 1, 1) end_time = datetime(2021, 1, 1) > self.client.get_klines(symbol, CandlesticksChartInervals.DAY, start_time=start_time, end_time=end_time)

def get_klines(self, symbol, interval: CandlesticksChartInervals, start_time: datetime = None, end_time: datetime = None, limit=500): """ Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.
If startTime and endTime are not sent, the most recent klines are returned. :param symbol: :param interval: :param start_time: :param end_time: :param limit:Default 500; max 1000. :return: dict object
Response: [ [ 1499040000000, // Open time "0.01634790", // Open "0.80000000", // High "0.01575800", // Low "0.01577100", // Close "148976.11427815" // Volume. ] ] """ if limit > CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT: raise ValueError('Limit should not exceed {}'.format( CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_MAX_LIMIT ))
params = {'symbol': symbol, 'interval': interval.value, 'limit': limit}
if start_time: params['startTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(start_time) if end_time: params['endTime'] = self._to_epoch_miliseconds(end_time) r = self.session.get(CurrencyComConstants.KLINES_DATA_ENDPOINT, params=params) > return r.json() ^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Future' object has no attribute 'json'
currencycom/client.py:426: AttributeError
